title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain architecture. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for homes, security, and industrial work. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform paired with Unitree H2 and Jetson Thor for researchers.
